category_sources: source_facts.description says drivers and libraries for Xbox Kinect; official OpenKinect README says libfreenect is a userspace driver for Microsoft Kinect.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libfreenect; official OpenKinect repository title is libfreenect.
docs_sources: Official OpenKinect repository README provides build and usage documentation; source_facts.homepage is the official OpenKinect project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated as https://github.com/OpenKinect/libfreenect; not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, executable names, and official OpenKinect README identify Kinect device driver/library support for RGB, depth, motors, accelerometer, LED, and audio.
